name: Twin Blocks
description: v1 - Twin dumbbell: 4x4 orthogonal ends with typed mids (Might/Magic/Side/Outer/Connector) + Buffer+Hub core; 4 mirrored mid-row interiors use unpredictable random-pool content; islands isolated except P1<->P2 Portal Treasure-A<->Treasure-G (150k). Co-op Classic - Matrix Standard.
